title: pilosella obscura subsp. basiphylla
intro: Pilosella obscura subsp. basiphylla, also known as a subspecies of the lesser knapweed, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Pilosella obscura subsp. basiphylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
